summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tipsy digital tipping app MVP. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend core flows working with minor language switching issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Language switching button present but content doesn't update immediately when clicked

integration_issues.issue: Timeout during navigation from profile setup to dashboard (10s timeout exceeded)

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Neon Noir theme and gradient text
Server authentication flow (phone input, OTP verification with mock code 123456)
Existing user login flow works correctly
Server dashboard displays stats cards and QR code button
QR code generation and download/share functionality
Customer tip flow with preset amounts (5, 10, 20, 50 EUR)
Payment breakdown display with transparent fees (tip, Tipsy 1%, bank fees)
All backend API endpoints (11/11 tests passed)
Tip checkout session creation with proper fee calculation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix language switching functionality - i18n content not updating immediately when language button is clicked. Also investigate profile setup navigation timeout issue.
